descriptions.value: Junko is a softie on the inside, but she's doesn't hide her emotions. You don't want to anger this lovely lady.
Junko isn't always so serious. She likes to have fun sometimes too!
A total sweetheart and airhead, Lili is always there when in need.
Lili doesn't get angry often, but when she does it's super cute.
It doesn't take much to excite Lili. With a kind heart and radiant smile, Lili's happiness is also infectious.
This savage beauty hasn't fully mastered common language, however her expressions speak a thousand words.
After living a lonesome, savage life, Rin-Rin is quick to the defensive, but her inner-self is much more peaceful.
She may be a fearsome warrior, but Rin-Rin is also a child at heart.

descriptions.value: In memory to great times
Just to check something
Big, heavy, and fully loaded
Another day, another game.
The most common type of undead that has been sighted within the facility. While easy to kill, they are dangerous in numbers. Do not underestimate.

After eating several corpses, the undead's muscular system starts to mutate into a more efficient killing machine. Extremely dangerous, use force in numbers or heavy guns to exterminate. 

For some reason they always show up right after one of our scientists die. Take this in account and setup an ambush.
Unable to defend themselves, they opted for a quick death instead of being ripped apart by the undead. This way they also help with the battle.
Their main function was to control the specimens. Now they serve as the first line of defense against the undead. These brave soldiers never survive.
These guards used to be looking for intruders outside the complex. They rushed inside as soon as the outbreak went out of control.
One of the strongest units. Their firepower is perfect to decimate the hordes. However, their chaingun takes some time to start shooting. Because of this, they always die ambushed near corners.
This type of weaponry was never deployed before within the facility. Perfect to exterminate the most dangerous types of undead.

They are known to be a wise leader. They have proven to successfully motivate the whole GoBlock's universe to keep moving.
They are the superstar of GoBlock's universe. They are very famous because of their uniqueness.
No block in GoBlock's universe knew what they look like. They only know them by name.
